title: Can I use API to get filters for the Board views?
excerpt: Using the API, I can get Board Views for a board. However, I’m interested in getting filters that are applied to the view and understanding which view is set as default. Is it possible?

posts.author: Magician (Ivan)
posts.cookedHtml: Using the API, I can get Board Views for a board. However, I’m interested in getting filters that are applied to the view and understanding which view is set as default. Is it possible?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Magician and welcome to the community!

This is not possible at the moment so thank you so much for creating the request for it
